evidence: The paper uses Random Forest and explicitly mentions "Mean Decrease in Gini values" as a capability that influenced classifier selection (Discussion, Section 4: "we recommend RF due to...informative generation of variable importance (i.e., Mean Decrease in Gini values)"). However, no variable importance values are reported in Results. All substantive conclusions concern overall/per-class classification accuracy (OA, PA, UA) and classifier performance under varying ROI heterogeneity, assessed via 75/25 Monte Carlo cross-validation with 100 iterations. Conclusions do not depend on importance magnitude or ranking.
